pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 37: 'Task: Record a $40.00 Cash payment'; export_result.sh line 26: database query checks for 'pay_amount >= 39.99 AND pay_amount <= 40.01'
setup_task.sh line 37: 'Record a $40.00 Cash payment'; export_result.sh line 26: 'LOWER(pay_type) LIKE '%cash%''

privileged_info_summary: The task reconciles daily payments in LibreHealth EHR using NHANES 2011-2012 real population health survey data. A randomly selected patient (no fixed case ID) receives a $40.00 cash payment that must be recorded in the system and verified in the Daily Report PDF generated at /home/ga/Desktop/day_sheet.pdf. Patient details are read from /home/ga/Desktop/payer_info.txt. All metadata values are correct and match the implementation in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
